sub_mechanisms: M_1: filter training loss by layer depth, computing partial losses L_0, L_1, ..., L_d for prefixes of model depth
M_2: from filtration, compute E_2 page differentials = changes in partial-loss derivative when going from L_k to L_{k+1}
M_3: detect convergence (E_2 → E_∞) = differentials below threshold for last 3 epochs
M_4: trigger depth cap (stop adding) or depth expansion (add layer) based on convergence direction
stripped_llm_application: A layer-depth controller that uses spectral-sequence E_2-page convergence as a stopping criterion for layer expansion during architecture search or progressive training.
stripping_rule_applied: removed: spectral-sequence (kept as 'cascade'), E_2/E_r (kept as 'page'), Serre/Massey/derived-functor
